drills.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I would go there every day before.
sentences.hindi: मैं पहले हर रोज़ वहाँ जाता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i would go there every day before

sentences.english: We ought to respect our parents.
sentences.hindi: हमें अपने माता-पिता की इज्जत करनी चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: we ought to respect our parents

drills.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: You ought to tell the truth.
sentences.pronunciation: you ought to tell the truth

sentences.english: He does not dare to say this.
sentences.hindi: उसकी हिम्मत नहीं है ऐसा कहने की।
sentences.pronunciation: he does not dare to say this

drills.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: I would not do this before.
sentences.hindi: मैं यह पहले नहीं करता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i would not do this before

sentences.english: We ought to follow the rules.
sentences.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: we ought to follow the rules

sentences.english: Do you dare to talk to him?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम्हें उससे बात करने की हिम्मत है?
sentences.pronunciation: do you dare to talk to him

drills.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Speaking Set 4

sentences.hindi: उसने ऐसा कहने की हिम्मत की।

drills.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: We ought to fulfill our responsibility.
sentences.pronunciation: we ought to fulfill our responsibility

drills.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: He did not dare to do this.
sentences.hindi: उसकी हिम्मत नहीं थी कि वह ऐसा कर सके।
sentences.pronunciation: he did not dare to do this

drills.title: Would + Ought To + Dare — Speaking Set 7

sentences.hindi: कैसे तुमने ऐसा कहने की हिम्मत की?
